members.label: door
members.description: white paneled interior door with silver lever handle
members.long_form_open_description: A closed white six-panel interior door (arched top panel) with white trim and a brushed-silver lever handle. Door is flush with the left wall; paint and trim are clean and in good condition. Hinges visible on the right edge of the door.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Located on the left wall; thermostat is mounted to the left of the door and the large framed painting is to the right of the door on the short back wall.
members.object_text_short: white paneled interior door with silver lever handle
members.object_text_long: left sector | A closed white six-panel interior door (arched top panel) with white trim and a brushed-silver lever handle. Door is flush with the left wall; paint and trim are clean and in good condition. Hinges visible on the right edge of the door.

members.label: door
members.description: white paneled interior door with lever handle
members.long_form_open_description: A white, raised-panel interior door occupying most of the left third of the image. It has a brushed metal lever handle on the lower left of the door face and visible hinges on the right edge. The door is set into a white door frame and appears closed. Paint is matte, trim is slightly glossy.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly left of the central wall with the framed painting; the door frame meets the left wall that continues behind the painting.
members.object_text_short: white paneled interior door with lever handle
